nasb.text: Now it came about when Solomon had finished building the house of the Lord, and the king’s house, and all that Solomon desired to do,

esv.text: As soon as Solomon had finished building the house of the Lord  and the king’s house and all that Solomon desired to build,

cnv.text: 所羅門建造完了耶和華的殿、王宮和所羅門渴想建造的一切以後，

ccb.text: 所罗门建完耶和华的殿、自己的王宫和所有要建的建筑后，
